query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `company_attachment_categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `displayOrder` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `isDefault` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `createdBy` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`companyId`) REFERENCES `companies`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`createdBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  INDEX `attachment_categories_company_id_idx` (`companyId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `company_attachments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `categoryId` int,
  `fileName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `fileUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `fileKey` text NOT NULL,
  `fileSize` int,
  `mimeType` varchar(100),
  `displayOrder` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `isDeleted` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `deletedBy` int,
  `deletedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `uploadedBy` int,
  `uploadedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`companyId`) REFERENCES `companies`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (`categoryId`) REFERENCES `company_attachment_categories`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`deletedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`uploadedBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  INDEX `attachments_company_id_idx` (`companyId`),
  INDEX `attachments_category_id_idx` (`categoryId`),
  INDEX `attachments_is_deleted_idx` (`isDeleted`)
);
